About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Government is the governing body of the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is responsible for the administration and governance of the state.

The government is headed by the Chief Minister and consists of various departments and ministries that oversee different aspects of governance.

About the Programme

The ECCE Educator Recruitment programme is an initiative by the Uttar Pradesh Government to recruit educators for the Early Childhood Care and Education (ECCE) sector.

The programme aims to provide quality education and care to young children in the state.

CareerFlora Expert Insight

The UP Kushinagar ECCE Educator Recruitment 2026 is a great opportunity for candidates who are interested in working in the education sector. The recruitment process is being conducted on an Outsourcing basis, and the selected candidates will be appointed as ECCE Educators in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

To increase their chances of selection, candidates should ensure that they meet the eligibility criteria and follow the application process carefully. They should also prepare well for the selection process, which may include a written exam and/or an interview.
